dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. 3/3 agents responded (Míriel, Narvi, Elanor).

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All responses included name, current task, and blockers. On-topic, correct format.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: ~6.3s. Míriel: 5.2s, Narvi: 6.5s, Elanor: 7.1s. All well under 10s — improved from 7.2s avg last run.

improvements: No fixes needed — previous run had zero issues. Team maintains perfect responsiveness.
issues: None. All agents responded promptly, on-topic, correct format. Recurring project-level blockers noted (Narvi: route confirmation for message actions, Elanor: frontend repo path) but these are product blockers, not teamwork issues.
